input_text: Mike is nicer than Eve. The car parked behind the house was blue. The cat slept on the velvet sofa. Sandra moved to the kitchen. The big mouse is strong. Baby bears eat no berries. The length of Nile is 10 meters. Muggles cannot disappear. The cup filled with water fell. Tom wanted to leave. If X1 is a grandfather of Y1, Y1 is not a child of X1. The man carrying a bag waved. Tallinn is a city. Mary was heard to sing. The book was read by Sara. The teacher showed the map to the students. John is in Estonia?
